item.title: As I said in my previous post, I'm transgender and have been transitioning for a few years now. Here are 2 pictures my mom took of me before I transitioned and now, in case you were curious.
item.dc:creator: Vylpes

item.title: Today marks the anniversary of the day I came out as transgender, and started transitioning. My mom took this of me and its the first picture of me that I actually like!

item.title: Dump of street musicians
item.description:
#1 Allie Sherlock ~ Stephen's Green Dublin
#2 Jubilee Stomp ~ Royal Street, New Orleans
#3 Spanish street musician Borja Catanesi and the 68 year old dancer from The Hague Mr Roland Parijs ~ The Hague, Netherlands
#4 Amsterdam ~ Jack Broadbent
#5 Jamming with street players ~ Florence
#6 Santiago Moreno ~ Buenos Aires, Argentina
#7 A castle’s melody – Moses Concas
#8 Light in Babylon / Hinech Yava ~ Istanbul
#9 A Roman teen playing covers of Ennio Morricone's music from his terrace above a deserted Piazza Navona Roma during the coronavirus lockdown
#10 Jackson Square, New Orleans
item.dc:creator: vidadobl6

item.title: Senators Marco Rubio and Steve Daines draw criticism for sharing screenshots of Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy as he addressed US lawmakers via Zoom on Saturday
item.description: A US house of reps member from Minnesota, Dean Phillips said Ukrainian Ambassador told them not to share anything about the meeting online for security reasons.

item.title: Troll level presidential
item.description: This is fucking priceless - Zelensky trolling the fuck out of Putin. For those that don’t know, Putin released the video recently that shows him at a table with some students, but it was shown to be a fake video that Putin made to show he wasn’t cowering away somewhere. Putin’s hand in the video actually goes through the microphone. So Zelensky showed he’s actually real, by moving the mic.
item.dc:creator: metalhippy1977

item.title: Sat-dump-day

item.title: At least two dead including a 5-year-old; two paralyzed including a 4-year-old - from a lavender room spray from Better Home and Gardens
item.description:
This began last year but the full story hasn't been thoroughly reported on until now. Nor do I think enough awareness was brought to it.
This highlighted part here. This PR speak. It is sickening. "...inconvenience this 'may' have caused." Sorry that our product *maybe* led to dead and paralyzed children. Hope it wasn't too much of a burden. Fuxk off.
I sure hope that the families who suffered receive at least *two* $20 gift cards. Thank you to the investigators at the CDC. Thank you to the mourning and suffering families who cooperated with what was likely a very intrusive investigation at the worst of times. Edit: Thank you @Toom1275. Here is a full list of products that may possibly be contaminated: https://arstechnica.com/science/2021/10/mystery-of-deadly-us-infections-solved-aromatherapy-spray-at-walmart-to-blame/ Again. This started last year but I have heard barely anything about it, and the full story hasn't been reported on until the CDC published their paper. There are likely many reading this who may have some of these sprays still in their homes. They are often cheap but nicely packaged. Could have been given as gifts or just bought randomly.
item.dc:creator: AlkeneThiol

item.title: I made an R2-D2 Leg Lamp
item.description: (Apologies. First upload had no sound) R2-D2 Leg lamp is complete! This is my first ever stained glass project, which I started designing back in December and began building shortly thereafter, taking about 7 weeks. Given that I now mostly work with wood, it’s fun to mix it up, learn a new skill, and add some more color to the mix. Of course, being the geek that I am, and having previously used an Adafruit soundboard in my Han & Chewy in the Millenium Falcon cockpit piece, the moment my brain hit upon the Artoo Leg Lamp idea, I knew I had to stick some unnecessary sound in there. The base is built from urban reclaimed maple and walnut, both of which were logs picked up on the side of the road within 2 blocks of our house. The panels that hold the electronics and speakers are affixed via magnets, in case I ever need to access them. I made many mistakes along the way, and the amateur nature of the shade is apparent on any close inspection, which was completely expected. Nonetheless, I’m incredibly stoked with how it turned out. It was certainly a challenge jumping straight to 3D with zero glass experience. But given that it’s a personal project that few will see in person, I figured “go big or go home”. Special thanks to my wife for convincing me to go back and add another level of glass after the shade was “complete”.
item.dc:creator: laughingmantisstudio

item.title: We did a thing together!
item.description:
Follow up post to: https://imgur.com/gallery/YJa7FrO As much of a nervous wreck I was meeting him for the first time in person (even after hours of skyping, texting and phone calls!), he was everything I could have hoped and prayed for. Hugging him for the first time at the airport nearly made my heart nearly explode and now that he's gone, I feel like part of my heart left with him. This was by far the biggest risk I think we both have ever taken and this had the best reward: confirmation that there is something special here, that we do in fact get along as well as we did from a distance, and that we genuinely do love and respect one another. And to think, it all started here on Imgur with just one post. I think -- no wait scratch that, I *know* he is the one, and if I'm as right as it feels, you're all in someway invited to the wedding.
So, naturally one would ask "Where would two dorks from Imgur go for their official first date? A fancy dinner? A romantic movie?" Psssh, no! We went to see knights try to kick each other's butts with a sassy Merlin in the mix. Thanks Excalibur and Tournament of Kings!
TL;DR: Two Imgur users finally met up in person, nervous mess of a girl doesn't ruin things with her overthinking, handsome guy is just as handsome, funny, caring and charming in person, both riding off in the sunset together. Neither one killed the other, neither one wants to be without the other now. This goofy girlfriend is already booking her ticket to see him again soon.
item.dc:creator: hopingthisworksout92

item.title: This 11 year old boy crossed the Slovak-Ukraine border alone
item.description: He came alone because his parrents had to stay in Ukraine. He only had his passport, one bag and a number written on his hand. Thanks to the number and a piece of paper inside of his passport the police were albe to locate his relatives. The boy was taken care of by the volunteers. He was give water and food also for his next journey. FP edit: His mother sent a video message to the slovak police. She thanked them, the volunteers and the border police. She’s a widow stuck in a town near the nuclear power plant we read about. She had to stay there because her mother can’t walk by herself. So she sat the boy on a train headed to the Slovak-Ukraine border.
item.dc:creator: EmotionallyCrippled

item.title: It's always something, isn't it?
item.description: Ah well. Time to go raid some islands for bells. :D Thank you to everyone offering to give tiny octopus bells, but it's not necessary. He's got lots of vegetable plots and every fruit tree, and Flick buys hornets for a bunch, so Bells come in slowly but surely. This is Tiny Octopus' Island Dream: "Isle View" DA-0277-9425-9770 It's a work in progress, but it's slowly getting there. :D
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus
